lane.title: 06 Meta Ads
lane.last_task: Initialize Meta Ads lane and live read
lane.last_summary: Read lane/control memory, decisions log, Meta lane history, live CTWA cockpit/API, and directions page. Current operational source is /api/ctwa-analytics, not stale /api/meta-status. Live payload shows active primary Maps campaign 120246002668360505 and retargeting campaign 120246050386040505 with spend/click/map bridge metrics; old April CTWA 120243729366800505 is archived. No Meta mutation performed.
lane.next_action: Before mutation, verify direct Meta Graph object reads for account act_634959029638544, campaign/adset/ad IDs, budgets, creative, objective, and delivery; then choose pause/tune/creative action with rollback.
lane.mutation_status: blocked until direct live Meta account verification; read-only cockpit/API verification only
